name: ABM Mustard Wheat Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Dump yeast into the machine.
2. Add in flours and lecithin granules.
3. Fill a measuring cup to 2/3rds with warm water.
4. Add mustard until the liquid measures a full cup. Stir in molasses.
5. Dump everything into the machine.
6. Set the machine to basic bake mode.
Tested on 3/3/94, this results in a small dark loaf with a nice mustardy flavor. While dense, it can be sliced quite thinly and makes a great egg salad sandwich. If you substitute another fat for the lecithin granules, you might want to add a little more gluten.
